content.query:
SELECT      DISTINCT OH.ORNO as [Order Number]
,           OH.RLDT AS [Ship Date]
,           oh.uca7 as [Carrier]
,           OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
,           COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OCD.CUNM) AS [Ship To Name]
,           COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OCD.CUA1) AS [Ship To Address 1]
,           COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OCD.CUA2) AS [Ship To Address 2]
FROM        M3.OOHEAD OH
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
--JOIN        M3.MHDISH MH ON OH.ORNO = MH.RIDN
--JOIN        M3.MPTRNS MP ON MH.DLIX = MP.DLIX
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOADRE OA ON OH.ORNO = OA.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSAD OCD ON OH.CUNO = OCD.CUNO AND OH.ADID = OCD.ADID
WHERE       OH.RLDT >= '2024-02-01'
and         oh.uca7 like '%UPS%'
AND         (OH.CUNO LIKE '7%' OR OH.CUNO LIKE '5%')
--AND         DLRM LIKE '%UPS%'
AND         (LEN(COALESCE(OA.CUNM, OCD.CUNM)) > 34 OR LEN(COALESCE(OA.CUA1, OCD.CUA1)) > 34 OR LEN(COALESCE(OA.CUA2, OCD.CUA2)) > 34)
